name: Place OCO Order
summary: Places a One-Cancels-the-Other (OCO) order by POSTing a jData JSON object (plus the login jKey) to the PlaceOCOOrder endpoint. The OCO order ties two full order legs (place_order_params and place_order_params_leg2) together with an oivariable array whose values are compared against the LTP; on success the response returns the created alert/OI id (al_id).

request_params.name: jData
request_params.description: Should send json object with fields in below list.

json_fields.name: uid
json_fields.description: User id of the logged in user.

json_fields.name: tsym
json_fields.description: Unique id of contract on which order to be placed. (use url encoding to avoid special char error for symbols like M&M)

json_fields.name: exch
json_fields.description: Exchange

json_fields.name: validity
json_fields.description: Validity

json_fields.name: ai_t
json_fields.description: Alert type

json_fields.name: exchsym
json_fields.description: Exchange symbol

json_fields.name: oivariable
json_fields.description: Array Object, details given below (see OIVARIABLE FORMAT).

json_fields.name: place_order_params
json_fields.description: List of place order Params fields (the first / leg-1 order parameters; see PLACE_ORDER_PARAMS FORMAT).

json_fields.name: place_order_params_leg2
json_fields.description: List of Place order params fields for leg2 (the second order parameters; see PLACE_ORDER_PARAMS FORMAT).

json_fields.name: oivariable.d
json_fields.description: OIVARIABLE FORMAT field: Data to be compared with LTP.

json_fields.name: oivariable.var_name
json_fields.description: OIVARIABLE FORMAT field: Variable Name.

json_fields.name: place_order_params.tsym
json_fields.description: PLACE_ORDER_PARAMS field: Trading symbol of the scrip (contract).

json_fields.name: place_order_params.exch
json_fields.description: PLACE_ORDER_PARAMS field: Exchange.

json_fields.name: place_order_params.trantype
json_fields.description: PLACE_ORDER_PARAMS field: B -> BUY, S -> SELL [transtype should be 'B' or 'S' else reject].

json_fields.name: place_order_params.prctyp
json_fields.description: PLACE_ORDER_PARAMS field: Price Type.

json_fields.name: place_order_params.prd
json_fields.description: PLACE_ORDER_PARAMS field: Product.

json_fields.name: place_order_params.ret
json_fields.description: PLACE_ORDER_PARAMS field: Retention type [ret should be DAY / EOS / IOC else reject].

json_fields.name: place_order_params.actid
json_fields.description: PLACE_ORDER_PARAMS field: Acct Id.

json_fields.name: place_order_params.uid
json_fields.description: PLACE_ORDER_PARAMS field: User Id.

json_fields.name: place_order_params.ordersource
json_fields.description: PLACE_ORDER_PARAMS field: Used to generate exchange info fields.

json_fields.name: place_order_params.remarks
json_fields.description: PLACE_ORDER_PARAMS field: Any tag by user to mark order.

json_fields.name: place_order_params.qty
json_fields.description: PLACE_ORDER_PARAMS field: Order Quantity [If qty is junk value other than numbers].

json_fields.name: place_order_params.prc
json_fields.description: PLACE_ORDER_PARAMS field: Order Price [If prc is junk value other than numbers] "Order price cannot be zero".

json_fields.name: place_order_params.trgprc
json_fields.description: PLACE_ORDER_PARAMS field: New trigger price in case of SL-LMT.

response_fields.name: stat
response_fields.description: OCO orders success or failure indication.

response_fields.name: request_time
response_fields.description: This will be present only in a successful response.

response_fields.name: emsg
response_fields.description: This will be present only in case of errors. That is: 1) Invalid Input 2) Session Expired.

issues: The curl request body spans two pages: the right-column code on page 36 holds the jData JSON up to leg2's "prc": "200", and page 37's right column carries the closing braces (}}) plus the &jKey=... tail of the SAME curl block (page-37 lines 104-105). The assembled sample_request is faithful. Required flags were re-checked against the trailing '*' in the images: required = uid, tsym, exch, validity, ai_t, place_order_params, place_order_params_leg2 (and inside the leg objects: tsym, exch, trantype, prctyp, prd, ret, actid, uid, qty, prc; plus oivariable.d and oivariable.var_name); NOT required = exchsym, oivariable, place_order_params.ordersource, place_order_params.remarks, place_order_params.trgprc. Corrected against the draft: the 'Possible value' column for oivariable, place_order_params and place_order_params_leg2 is BLANK in the doc (the phrases 'Array Object' / 'List of ...' live in the Description column), so their possible_values were cleared (draft wrongly had 'Array Object' / 'Object'); and ai_t's possible_values/description were trimmed to the doc's literal 'Alert type'. Value bindings verified: validity=DAY or GTT, oivariable.var_name=x or y, trantype=B / S, ret=DAY / EOS / IOC, ordersource=MOB / WEB / TT. prctyp and prd have no possible-value enum cell (blank). The sample JSON includes a top-level "remarks" key that is not in the top-level jData table (remarks is documented under PLACE_ORDER_PARAMS).
notes:
- BaseURL in the curl resolves to https://piconnect.flattrade.in/PiConnectAPI, so the full URL is https://piconnect.flattrade.in/PiConnectAPI/PlaceOCOOrder.
- jData and jKey are sent as a url-encoded form body (jData={...}&jKey=...), not raw JSON, despite the Content-Type: application/json header.
- tsym: use URL encoding to avoid special-char errors for symbols like M&M.
- An OCO order requires BOTH legs: place_order_params (leg 1) and place_order_params_leg2 (leg 2), each a full PLACE_ORDER_PARAMS object.
- oivariable is an array of {d, var_name} where var_name is x or y and d is the value compared against LTP (the alert trigger boundaries).
- trantype must be exactly 'B' or 'S' else reject; ret must be DAY / EOS / IOC else reject.
- prc (order price) cannot be zero; qty/prc are rejected if junk (non-numeric) values.
- trgprc is the new trigger price, used in case of SL-LMT price type.
- On success stat is "OI created" and al_id is the created alert/OI id; request_time appears only on success. On failure stat is "Not_Ok" and emsg carries the reason (Invalid Input or Session Expired).
- The very next section (Modify OCO Order, POST /PiConnectAPI/ModifyOCOOrder) begins on page 38 and is out of scope for this extraction.
